_meta.framework: Satellite Strike Ch9 — core/satellite split. Aggressive strategies confined to the satellite sleeve (10-40% cap). Drawdown -> size-cut rules per profile; monthly review per Ch9.4.3.
_meta.provenance: Win rates referenced are LOCAL scanner/dev samples, not production-verified.

drawdown_rules: Drawdown 3% from high-water mark -> cut satellite per-trade size by 50%.
Drawdown 5% -> pause the satellite sleeve entirely (no new aggressive entries; manage existing to exit).
Drawdown 8% -> cut core (zaky_strategy) per-trade size by 50%.
Drawdown 10% -> pause all new entries (core and satellite); flat-or-manage only until equity recovers above the 5% drawdown line.
Drawdown 5% from high-water mark -> cut satellite per-trade size by 50%.
Drawdown 8% -> pause the satellite sleeve entirely.
Drawdown 12% -> cut core (zaky_strategy) per-trade size by 50%.
Drawdown 15% -> pause all new entries; manage-to-exit only until equity recovers above the 8% drawdown line.
Drawdown 7% from high-water mark -> cut satellite per-trade size by 50% and drop the decayed hmm-top3 to half its already-reduced size.
Drawdown 12% -> pause the satellite sleeve entirely (including hmm-top3).
Drawdown 18% -> cut core (zaky_strategy) per-trade size by 50%.
Drawdown 22% -> pause all new entries; manage-to-exit only until equity recovers above the 12% drawdown line.

monthly_review_checklist: Re-run scripts/compute-strategy-decay.py and re-check every strategy's edge-decay flag: DECAYED when rolling-90d win rate < 25.4% (0.5x the 50.8% baseline, Ch7); also note any strategy in 'watch' (below 50.8% baseline but above 25.4%).

Confirm the core sleeve still holds only the highest-conviction healthy strategy (zaky_strategy, last measured 61.5% local, healthy). If its rolling-90d drops below baseline, downgrade it from core and leave the core sleeve empty rather than promote a satellite strategy.
Rebalance both sleeves back to the profile's target core/satellite split; trim whichever sleeve drifted above target.

Demote any strategy that crossed into DECAYED this month out of any larger allocation and into reduced-size satellite-only, or remove it entirely if realized RR is negative (hmm-top3 reference: mean -0.12 pct, local).
Verify the satellite sleeve cap is within the Ch9 band (10-40%) and matches the profile target (Conservative ~10%, Moderate ~25%, Aggressive ~40%).
Verify aggressive strategies (tradingview_screener bulk scan, scalp variants, decayed hmm-top3) remain satellite-only and never leaked into the core sleeve.
Confirm slippage assumption is still flagged 'pending real data' until execution fills are recorded; do not assume zero-cost fills.
Log the discipline review: date, metrics snapshot used (local scanner/dev sample, not production), every demotion/promotion, the resulting split, and confirmation the satellite cap held.
